# Mermaid Editor

Online Mermaid diagram editor with live preview and SVG/PNG export. No backend, no login required.

URL: https://caoergou.github.io/mermaid-pic/

## Opening a diagram via URL

Base64-encode the Mermaid code and pass it as a `?code=` query parameter:

```
https://caoergou.github.io/mermaid-pic/?code={base64(mermaid_code)}
```

### Encoding examples

JavaScript:
```js
const url = `https://caoergou.github.io/mermaid-pic/?code=${btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(code)))}`;
```

Python:
```python
import base64
url = "https://caoergou.github.io/mermaid-pic/?code=" + base64.b64encode(code.encode()).decode()
```

## Supported diagram types

flowchart, sequenceDiagram, classDiagram, stateDiagram-v2, erDiagram, gantt, pie, mindmap, architecture-beta, gitGraph, block-beta

## Features

- Live preview with 300ms debounce
- Export as SVG or PNG (2x resolution)
- 5 themes: default, dark, forest, neutral, base
- Hand-drawn style toggle
- Shareable URL via `?code=` or `#hash`
